GateStatistic.title: GateStatistic
GateStatistic.description: Aggregated passenger statistics for a specific gate on a specific date.

date.description: The date of the statistics in YYYY-MM-DD format.

totalPassengers.description: Total number of passengers through this gate on this date.

hourlyData.description: Map of Hour Bucket (e.g., '12:00 - 13:00') to a map of Ticket Type to Count.

laneData.description: Map of Lane Name to Count and Duration.

DailySummary.title: DailySummary
DailySummary.description: Aggregated daily summary for the entire facility.

date.description: The date of the summary in YYYY-MM-DD format.

totalPassengers.description: Total number of passengers for the entire facility on this date.

gateTotals.description: Map of Gate Name to Total Count.

hourlyTotals.description: Map of Hour Bucket to Total Count (summed across all gates).

ticketTotals.description: Map of Ticket Type to Total Count (summed across all gates).

gateHourlyTotals.description: Map of Gate Name to its Hourly Breakdown (Gate -> Hour -> Total).

gateTicketTotals.description: Map of Gate Name to its Ticket Breakdown (Gate -> Ticket -> Total).

gate_statistics/{statId}.description: Stores daily aggregated passenger statistics per gate.

daily_summaries/{date}.description: Stores daily aggregated summary for the entire facility.
